title: anthonotha graciliflora
intro: Anthonotha graciliflora, also known as the silky-stemmed tree, is a species of plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Anthonotha graciliflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
